headlines.title: Mamdani offers a contrast to Trump’s vision for America in a 250th anniversary address
headlines.description: The New York mayor gave a solidly pro-immigration speech, flanked by recently naturalized citizens, hours before the president plans to give his own address at Mount Rushmore.

headlines.title: Air Force officer arrested at Capitol after calling for Trump’s impeachment
headlines.description: Maj. Jason Watson was in uniform when U.S. Capitol Police arrested him. He criticized Trump’s actions in Iran and Venezuela, as well as his immigration policies.

headlines.title: Millions expected at delayed Khamenei funeral as Iran seeks to project strength
headlines.description: Iran says millions are expected to turn out for the funeral, which will serve as a grand religious and political spectacle months after Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was killed.

headlines.title: Lawmakers working across aisle have become ‘endangered species': House’s only independent member
headlines.description: This Independence Day, the number of political independents in America is at an all-time high. Rep. Kevin Kiley (I-Calif.) joins Meet the Press NOW as one of only three independent lawmakers in Congress to discuss the lack of independent representation in Congress and the importance of finding common ground across political parties.

headlines.title: Gov. Wes Moore on ‘responsibility’ to show ‘patriotism is not political’
headlines.description: Gov. Wes Moore (D-Md.) joins Meet the Press NOW to preview his upcoming address on America’s 250th birthday as President Trump prepares to deliver his own remarks.

headlines.title: Trump’s ‘ramped up’ rhetoric leaves unifying tone of July Fourth speech in question
headlines.description: President Trump prepares to travel to Mount Rushmore to deliver remarks for the United States’ 250th birthday. NBC News correspondents Gabe Gutierrez and Julie Tsirkin join Meet the Press NOW to discuss what to expect from the President’s upcoming addresses and July Fourth celebrations.

headlines.title: As the nation turns 250, many Americans say flying the Stars and Stripes is now a red flag
headlines.description: The American flag can have many meanings, whether hung on front porches or waved in parades and protests. To some, it’s also tied up with President Trump.

headlines.title: America at 250 is riven with doubt and pessimism — but with glimmers of hope
headlines.description: Americans have a bleak outlook on the nation’s future ahead of its 250th birthday next month, with most saying the U.S. has already seen its best days and a record-low number saying they are extremely proud to be Americans, according to a new NBC News poll

headlines.title: Great American State Fair attendees say they haven’t noticed politics overshadowing the event
headlines.description: Trump kicked off the event with a headlining speech Wednesday after musical acts dropped out of the lineup citing concerns over partisanship.

headlines.title: Americans believe they aren’t being taught enough about democracy
headlines.description: For Thomas Jefferson, James Madison and other bold-face names struggling to bring about a new nation, an educated and informed citizenry was essential to the success of the American experiment.

headlines.title: Americans see a huge divide between haves and have-nots, new poll shows
headlines.description: A national NBC News poll finds 81% of Americans say there is more that divides than unites the wealthy and ordinary working people.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.
